headline.text: L3 ML1 Dorner 1 belt remains damaged and in service — no spare available, *damage* reported since Saturday night.

summary: Single food-safety flag: L3 ML1 operating with damaged Dorner 1 conveyor belt since weekend; no spare in inventory to replace it.

food_safety.title: Damaged Dorner 1 conveyor belt still in service
food_safety.summary: ML1 Dorner 1 belt has sustained damage (referenced in Saturday night report) and remains in use; no spare belt available for replacement, creating potential for belt material to enter product stream.
food_safety.status: Open — damaged belt remains in service, no spare available to replace it.

opportunities.text: Consider establishing critical spare-parts inventory (belts, scrapers, blades) to avoid extended operation with damaged equipment — based on ML1 Dorner 1 belt running damaged since Saturday due to no spare availability.
